pages.text: What is that?! What is that doof-doof-doof noise? A cat? A mouse? A visitor in the house?

blocks.text: What is that?! What is that doof-doof-doof noise?
A cat? A mouse? A visitor in the house?

pages.text: No, it’s something even furrier than a cat, even cuter than a mouse, and much tinier than you and me.

blocks.text: No, it’s something even furrier than a cat, even cuter than a mouse, and much tinier than you and me.

pages.text: It’s the three Doof-Doofs. These sweet creatures have only one foot each to hop on. And each hop makes a thumping doof-doof on the floor.

blocks.text: It’s the three Doof-Doofs.
These sweet creatures have only one foot each to hop on. And each hop makes a thumping doof-doof on the floor.

pages.text: ahhhh uhh who is Here always is Solly thinking Doof, looooong the smart and one, loud. He uhhs and ahhs and doof-doofs all night long.

blocks.text: ahhhh uhh
who is Here always is Solly thinking Doof, looooong the smart and one, loud.
He uhhs and ahhs and doof-doofs all night long.

pages.text: He reads daytime stories to the other Doof-Doofs, because unlike you and me, that is when they sleep. Thinky, stinky Solly Doof prefers reading over bathing any time.

blocks.text: He reads daytime stories to the other Doof-Doofs, because unlike you and me, that is when they sleep.
Thinky, stinky Solly Doof prefers reading over bathing any time.

pages.text: And here is Sally Doof, the smallest and sweetest Doof-Doof of the three. In a little quiet voice she sings doobee-doobee Doof-Doof songs, when it gets a bit too quiet in the night.

blocks.text: And here is Sally Doof, the smallest and sweetest Doof-Doof of the three.
In a little quiet voice she sings doobee-doobee Doof-Doof songs, when it gets a bit too quiet in the night.

pages.text: She likes finding shiny things and cuddles. Snuggly, huggly Sally Doof who loves to sing. clink clankclunk

blocks.text: She likes finding shiny things and cuddles. Snuggly, huggly Sally Doof who loves to sing.
clink clankclunk

pages.text: Don’t forget Silly Doof, the funniest Doof-Doof in the house. He is always joking. hahahahaha! Wiggly, giggly Silly Doof will make you laugh until your tummy hurts. He cheers up the other Doof-Doofs whenever they feel sad.

blocks.text: Don’t forget Silly Doof, the funniest Doof-Doof in the house. He is always joking.
hahahahaha!
Wiggly, giggly Silly Doof will make you laugh until your tummy hurts.
He cheers up the other Doof-Doofs whenever they feel sad.

pages.text: He loves to dance on his big silly foot, to the songs that Sally Doof sings.

blocks.text: He loves to dance on his big silly foot, to the songs that Sally Doof sings.

pages.text: So, if at night you ever hear a strange doof-doof noise again, remember, it’s just the three Doof-Doofs, reading, singing and dancing on their one doof-doof foot.

blocks.text: So, if at night you ever hear a strange doof-doof noise again, remember, it’s just the three Doof-Doofs, reading, singing and dancing on their one doof-doof foot.

pages.text: So sleep well, little one. Or keep one eye open...

blocks.text: So sleep well, little one. Or keep one eye open...

pages.text: Because maybe, just maybe, you’ll see three cute little creatures hopping past on one foot, going doof-doof-doof.

blocks.text: Because maybe, just maybe, you’ll see three cute little creatures hopping past on one foot, going doof-doof-doof.
